---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in IdentityOS
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Affected module

Which part of IdentityOS is affected? (e.g. `spec/`, `core/`, `runtime/`, `adapters/`, `cli/`, `sdk/`, `identity_graph/`)

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including any error messages, stack traces, or logs.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- IdentityOS commit/version: [e.g. main @ abc1234]
- Runtime/adapter used (if applicable): [e.g. OpenAI adapter]

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or identity JSON snippets about the problem here.
